title: SoundProfiles
description: A client side fabric mod for saving and using sound profiles with keybindings!
body:
This is a client Fabric mod for Minecraft. It creates 4 sound profiles that can be modified and then applied with customizable keybindings. The sound profiles change all the different sound categories for Minecraft. Useful for quickly turning the sound down when, for instance, at a noisy mob farm, and then back up when leaving.

****Versions 0.2.0 and above requires Cloth-Config-API****

See:
[https://github.com/Rocky-Stone/SoundProfiles/blob/master/README.md](https://github.com/Rocky-Stone/SoundProfiles/blob/master/README.md)
for instructions.
